examples_json: [{"en":"If it rains, I'll stay home.","zh":"如果下雨，我就呆在家。"}]
[{"en":"Ice melts when it's warm.","zh":"冰在温暖时融化。"}]
[{"en":"Mix red and blue to get purple.","zh":"混合红色和蓝色得到紫色。"}]
[{"en":"If you study, you will pass.","zh":"如果你学习，你会通过的。"}]
[{"en":"She passed the exam.","zh":"她通过了考试。"}]
[{"en":"Hurry up or we'll be late.","zh":"快点，不然我们要迟到了。"}]

description: 第二条件句主句助动词。
examples_json: [{"en":"If I had money, I would travel.","zh":"如果我有钱，我会旅行。"}]
[{"en":"If he lived closer, he could visit.","zh":"如果他住得近，他可以来拜访。"}]

description: 第二条件句中表可能性较低。
examples_json: [{"en":"If I had time, I might go.","zh":"如果我有时间，我可能会去。"}]

description: 第三条件句if从句用had+过去分词。
examples_json: [{"en":"If I had known, I would have come.","zh":"如果我知道，我就来了。"}]
[{"en":"I would have passed if I had studied.","zh":"如果我学了，我本来会通过的。"}]

description: 表达与事实相反的愿望。
examples_json: [{"en":"I wish I were taller.","zh":"我希望我更高。"}]
[{"en":"If only I had known!","zh":"要是我早知道就好了！"}]
[{"en":"I won't go unless you come.","zh":"除非你来，否则我不去。"}]
[{"en":"You can stay as long as you're quiet.","zh":"只要你安静，就可以留下。"}]
[{"en":"Hurry up, otherwise we'll be late.","zh":"快点，否则我们要迟到了。"}]
[{"en":"I'll go provided that he agrees.","zh":"只要他同意，我就去。"}]
